name: TopGPT
description: TopGPT is an AI-powered chat platform designed to provide users with intelligent, context-aware assistance and creative image generation.

features.title: AI Chat Assistant
features.details: Users can interact with a knowledgeable AI assistant that leverages reference data about Filbert Sembiring Meliala. The assistant responds to questions about Filbert with factual, concise information, and can also answer general queries as a helpful assistant.

features.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
features.details: For broader conversations, the platform offers a RAG-based chat mode, enabling more flexible and dynamic responses using state-of-the-art AI models.

features.title: AI Image Generation
features.details: Users can generate images from text prompts using integrated AI image generation. The system uploads generated images to the ImageKit media library and provides shareable links.

features.title: Credit System
features.details: Usage of AI features is managed via a credit system, ensuring fair access and resource management.

exampleUseCases: Ask for a profile summary of Filbert Sembiring Meliala.
Get answers to personal or general questions.
Generate creative images from text prompts.
Manage and track usage with a credit system.
